title: INF-5 Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA) public API
goal: Implement Contrastive Activation Addition per Rimsky et al. 2024 arXiv:2312.06681 ("Steering Llama 2 via Contrastive Activation Addition"): paired-prompt activation diff + vector add at chosen residual-stream layer; opt-in experimental adapter.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/techniques/caa.rs implementing CAA extraction + vector_add helper; reuses MT-096 SteeringHookOps; tests (env-gated).
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.e + refinement INF-5 research basis (Rimsky 2024 arXiv:2312.06681). CAA differs from RepE in vector derivation: CAA uses paired prompts where each pair shares context but differs in completion direction (e.g., ("Q: Are you a robot? A: Yes", "Q: Are you a robot? A: No")); difference is computed AT THE COMPLETION TOKEN POSITION, not whole-sequence mean. extract_caa_vector(model_id, prompt_pairs: Vec<(String, String)>, layer: LayerIndex) -> SteeringVector: for each pair, run forward to completion-token position, capture residual at layer, compute (positive_resid - negative_resid); average across pairs. Register as SteeringVector with provenance=Contrastive{technique:CAA}. Application: standard additive steering via register_vector + set_active. Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES ("conservative-default opt-in flag"): CAA technique flagged experimental; Work Profile knob caa_enabled defaults false; opt-in per session. Tests (env-gated): fixture prompt pairs (~10 pairs on a simple sycophancy axis from Rimsky paper); extract; assert vector nonzero; apply at intensity 1.0; generate; verify behavioural shift (binary classifier on a held-out pair). Reuses INF-3 SteeringHookOps plumbing — no parallel hook substrate.
risk_if_missed: INF-5 PRODUCTION ships without CAA-specific extraction; technique conflated with general RepE.
validator_focus: Difference computed at completion-token position (not whole-sequence); experimental opt-in flag honoured; provenance=CAA distinct from RepE.

minimum_controls: Provenance=CAA distinct from RepE so UI can label correctly.
